name: Vitally API
what_it_does: REST API for Vitally's customer success platform, enabling B2B SaaS teams to push and retrieve account data, user traits, events, notes, tasks, and NPS scores.
use_cases: Push product usage events and user traits to drive CS health scores
Sync account data from CRM (Salesforce, HubSpot) into Vitally
Retrieve NPS survey results for external reporting
Automate note and task creation based on product signals
Integrate CS data into data warehouses or custom dashboards
not_for: Companies not using Vitally as their CS platform
High-volume real-time event streaming at very large scale
Non-SaaS B2B companies — Vitally is purpose-built for SaaS CS
best_when: You are a growing B2B SaaS company that uses Vitally and wants to automate CS workflows, push product data, or build integrations with the rest of your tech stack.
avoid_when: You need enterprise features like HIPAA compliance, multi-region data residency, or have very high ingestion volume requirements.

auth.notes: Bearer token authentication using a Vitally API secret key generated in account settings

pricing.paid_tiers: Subscription plans for SMB through enterprise; API access included with paid plans
pricing.notes: Pricing requires contacting sales; positioned as a more affordable Gainsight alternative for mid-market SaaS

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits apply; documented in API reference but specific numbers vary by tier

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Standard HTTP status codes with JSON error bodies; generally more descriptive than competitors
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Account and user upserts are idempotent by external ID; event ingestion is append-only
known_agent_gotchas: No free trial or sandbox environment for API testing without a paid account
Limited SDK support — agents must work directly with raw HTTP
External ID must be set correctly for upsert behavior; mismatches create duplicates
Webhook payload format differs from REST response format in some cases
Data residency limited to US; EU-only customers may have compliance concerns

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced, Bearer token auth, SOC2 Type II certified, GDPR compliant
